An implementation of generalized linear models (GLMs) for studying
relationships among attributes in connected populations, where responses
of connected units can be dependent, as introduced by Fritz et al.
(2025)
\<[doi:10.1080/01621459.2025.2565851](https://doi.org/10.1080/01621459.2025.2565851)\>.
'igml' extends GLMs for independent responses to dependent responses and
can be used for studying spillover in connected populations and other
network-mediated phenomena.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`control.iglm()`](control.iglm.md) : Set Control Parameters for iglm
  Estimation
- [`copenhagen`](copenhagen.md) : Copenhagen Network Study
- [`create_userterms_skeleton()`](create_userterms_skeleton.md) :
  Generate the Skeleton for an R Package to Implement Additional iglm
  Terms
- [`iglm-terms`](iglm-terms.md) [`iglm.terms`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`degrees-term`](iglm-terms.md) [`edges-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`mutual-term`](iglm-terms.md) [`cov_z-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`cov_z_out-term`](iglm-terms.md) [`cov_z_in-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`cov_x-term`](iglm-terms.md) [`cov_y-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`attribute_xy-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`attribute_yz-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`attribute_xz-term`](iglm-terms.md) [`inedges_y-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`outedges_y-term`](iglm-terms.md) [`inedges_x-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`outedges_x-term`](iglm-terms.md) [`attribute_x-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`attribute_y-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`edges_x_match-term`](iglm-terms.md)
  [`edges_y_match-term`](iglm-terms.md)

  [`spillover_yx_scaled-term`](iglm-terms.md)

  [`gwodegree-term`](iglm-terms.md)

- [`iglm()`](iglm.md) : Construct an iglm Model Specification Object
- [`iglm.data()`](iglm.data.md) : Constructor for the iglm.data R6
  object
- [`iglm.data_generator`](iglm.data_generator.md) : Networks with
  Unit-Level Attributes (R6 Class)
- [`iglm.object.generator`](iglm.object.generator.md) : iglm Objects (R6
  Class)
- [`results()`](results.md) : Constructor for the results R6 Object
- [`results.generator`](results.generator.md) : iglm Estimation and
  Simulation Results (R6 Class)
- [`sampler.iglm()`](sampler.iglm.md) : Constructor for a iglm Sampler
- [`sampler.iglm.generator`](sampler.iglm.generator.md) : iglm Sampler
  Settings (R6 Class)
- [`sampler.net.attr()`](sampler.net.attr.md) : Constructor for Single
  Component Sampler Settings
- [`sampler.net.attr.generator`](sampler.net.attr.generator.md) : Single
  Component Sampler Settings (R6 Class)
- [`simulate_iglm()`](simulate_iglm.md) : Simulate Responses and
  Connections
- [`state_twitter`](state_twitter.md) : Twitter (X) data list for U.S.
  state legislators (10-state subset)
- [`statistics()`](statistics.md) : Compute Statistics
